channel.title: DailyBite — Daily Food Deals
channel.description: The best verified food deals, updated every morning.

item.title: Panera Bread: Mix & Match $4.99 Menu
item.description: Pick up to 10 half-portion soups, sandwiches, or salads at around 40% off regular menu prices. (Ongoing)

item.title: Sweetgreen: Alice Waters' Peach & Goat Cheese Salad — Limited-Edition Summer Drop
item.description: Chef-collab seasonal salad available in-app and nationwide through August 10; 1% of net sales donated to the Edible Schoolyard Project. (Through August 10, 2026)

item.title: Shake Shack: Any Custard for $3 — Code CUSTARDTIME
item.guid: Shake Shack-Any Custard for $3 — Code CUSTARDTIME-2026-07-20
item.description: Use code CUSTARDTIME in the Shake Shack app or kiosk to get any custard for $3 through August 19. (Through August 19, 2026)

item.title: Wingstop: $16.99 Boneless Meal Deal — 20 Wings + Fries + 2 Dips
item.guid: Wingstop-$16.99 Boneless Meal Deal — 20 Wings + F-2026-07-20
item.description: Get 20 boneless wings in up to four flavors, a large fry, and two dips for $16.99 via Wingstop.com or the app. (Limited time)

item.title: Domino's: $9.99 Any Pizza — Any Crust, Any Toppings
item.guid: Domino's-$9.99 Any Pizza — Any Crust, Any Topping-2026-07-20
item.description: Order any pizza with up to 7 toppings — including Parmesan Stuffed Crust — for $9.99 through July 26. (Through July 26, 2026)

item.title: Pizza Hut: $9.99 Any Pizza Deal — Includes Parmesan Stuffed Crust
item.guid: Pizza Hut-$9.99 Any Pizza Deal — Includes Parmesan-2026-07-20
item.description: Get any pizza on the menu for $9.99 through July 26, now including Parmesan Stuffed Crust at no extra charge. (Through July 26, 2026)

item.title: Popeyes: $5 Faves Menu — Chicken, Tenders, Shrimp or Sandwich
item.guid: Popeyes-$5 Faves Menu — Chicken, Tenders, Shrimp-2026-07-20
item.description: Choose from 3pc Signature Chicken, 3pc Tenders, an 8pc Butterfly Shrimp, or a Chicken Sandwich for just $5 in-store, online, or in the app. (Through August 31, 2026)

item.title: Subway: BOGO 50% Off Any Footlong — Last Day Today!
item.guid: Subway-BOGO 50% Off Any Footlong — Last Day Tod-2026-07-20
item.description: Buy one Footlong at regular price and get a second at 50% off; valid through July 20 for Sub Club members in the app. (Through July 20, 2026)

item.title: Burger King: $5 Your Way Meal — Daily In-App Value
item.guid: Burger King-$5 Your Way Meal — Daily In-App Value-2026-07-20
item.description: Build a $5 combo meal daily through the BK app, with Royal Perks coupons also available for BOGO Whopper deals. (Ongoing)

item.title: McDonald's: $5 Value Meal Box — Daily In-App
item.guid: McDonald's-$5 Value Meal Box — Daily In-App-2026-07-20
item.description: Get a McDouble or McChicken, 4-piece McNuggets, small fries, and a small drink for $5 exclusively in the McDonald's app. (Ongoing)

item.title: Taco Bell: $5.99 Luxe Cravings Box
item.description: Get a Chalupa Supreme, Beefy 5-Layer Burrito, Double Stacked Taco, chips & nacho sauce, and a medium drink for $5.99 in the app. (Ongoing)

item.title: Dunkin': $6 Meal Deal — Medium Coffee + 2 Wake-Up Wraps
item.guid: Dunkin'-$6 Meal Deal — Medium Coffee + 2 Wake-Up-2026-07-20
item.description: Grab a medium hot or iced coffee paired with two Wake-Up Wrap sandwiches for just $6. (Ongoing)

item.title: Denny's: 'The Clock's Off' All-Day Menu — Late Night Available
item.description: Denny's new 'The Clock's Off' menu spans breakfast, lunch, and dinner items available around the clock at participating locations. (Ongoing)

item.title: Jack in the Box: Daily App Coupons — BOGOs & Burger Deals
item.guid: Jack in the Box-Daily App Coupons — BOGOs & Burger D-2026-07-20
item.description: The Jack in the Box app rotates daily deals including BOGOs on tacos, burgers, and meal combos — check the Deals tab before ordering. (Ongoing)
